description: A propulsion integration engineer needs a basic propeller model for the King Air 350-class turboprop to integrate into a full aircraft assembly. A specification document from the propeller vendor (Hartzell) has been provided at /home/ga/Desktop/propeller_spec.txt. Read this specification to get the geometric parameters. Then, in OpenVSP, create a new Propeller geometry component (using Geom browser -> Add -> Propeller). Rename the component to match the specified model name exactly. Set the propeller's number of blades, diameter, and precone angle according to the specification. Ensure the blade has at least 3 radial cross-sections defined. Save the completed model to /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/kingair_propeller.vsp3.
